name: Patient 29
history: Strong identification with research lab workplace and camaraderie. Close coworker left, which had emotional significance. Lab contrasts with unpredictable personal life.
helpless_belief: I am bound to lose what matters
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be abandoned
intermediate_belief: Work is my only stable source of belonging.
intermediate_belief_depression: Good things always end; I'm destined to be left behind.
coping_strategies: Overinvestment in work, emotional avoidance in personal life, idealizing workplace.
situation: The departure of a valued colleague and the immediate impact of this change.
auto_thought: "The lab won't be the same. I'm losing my work family. Nothing lasts."
behavior: Works longer hours to fill void, avoids socializing with remaining colleagues, idealizes departed coworker.
